game_info.title: Fruit Fusion
game_info.concept: Match Game is a physics-based puzzle where players strategically drop various fruits into a container, aiming to merge identical fruits upon collision to create progressively larger ones. The central mechanic involves careful placement using left/right swipes and drops, as two matching fruits combine into the next fruit in a predetermined sequence, culminating in a giant watermelon. The game's primary rule dictates that if fruits spill over the container's top edge, the game ends, emphasizing spatial management and foresight. Progression is measured by achieving high scores through successful merges and the ultimate challenge of creating the largest watermelon, rather than distinct levels. Controls are simple swipe-and-drop gestures. Monetization, while not explicitly detailed, typically involves rewarded video ads for retries or power-ups, and optional in-app purchases for ad removal or cosmetic enhancements.
game_info.description: Welcome to Fruit Fusion! Drop colorful fruits into a container and watch them merge when identical fruits touch. Start with small cherries and work your way up through strawberries, grapes, oranges, apples, pears, peaches, pineapples, melons, and finally the ultimate watermelon! Plan your drops carefully - if fruits pile up and cross the danger line at the top, it's game over. Score points with every merge, with bigger fruits earning exponentially more points. Master the physics and spatial strategy to achieve the highest score!
game_info.controls:
- Left Arrow: Move fruit left
- Right Arrow: Move fruit right
- Space: Drop fruit
- Enter: Start game (from start screen)
- Esc: Pause/Unpause game
- R: Restart (return to start screen)

TEST_1.test_description: Testing the optimal winning strategy by creating a watermelon through strategic fruit placement and merging. This validates the core merge mechanics and physics interactions work correctly to achieve the ultimate goal.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Drop fruits in a systematic pattern, alternating sides to create balanced stacks. Wait for physics to settle between drops. Target merging identical fruits by placing them adjacent. Build progressively larger fruits through the merge chain until achieving a watermelon.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Successfully create at least one watermelon by merging two melons together. The game state should reflect high score achievement. Physics should handle all collisions and merges correctly without fruits escaping the container or passing through boundaries.

TEST_2.test_description: Testing basic movement and drop mechanics. Validates that the player can control fruit position before dropping and that drops execute correctly with proper physics initialization.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Move the preview fruit left and right across the full width of the container. Drop fruits at various positions to test physics. Verify fruits fall correctly and interact with container walls and other fruits.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Preview fruit responds to left/right inputs smoothly. Dropped fruits fall with realistic physics, bounce appropriately on collision, and stay within container bounds. No fruits escape or behave erratically.

TEST_3.test_description: Testing game over condition by intentionally filling the container past the danger line. This validates that overflow detection works correctly and triggers appropriate game state transitions.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Game detects when fruits cross the danger line and transitions to GAME_OVER_LOSE state. Final score is displayed correctly. Game state prevents further drops once game over is triggered.
TEST_3.description: Testing game over condition by intentionally filling the container past the danger line. This validates that overflow detection works correctly and triggers appropriate game state transitions.
TEST_3.expected: Game detects when fruits cross the danger line and transitions to GAME_OVER_LOSE state. Final score is displayed correctly. Game state prevents further drops once game over is triggered.

TEST_4.test_description: Testing merge chain reactions and scoring system. Validates that multiple simultaneous merges are handled correctly and score calculations are accurate for different fruit types.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Create situations where multiple merges can happen in sequence or simultaneously. Drop matching fruits in positions that trigger chain reactions. Track score increases for each merge type.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: All merges execute correctly without duplicating or losing fruits. Score increases appropriately based on fruit type (higher-tier fruits give more points). Chain reactions process completely before next drop is allowed.
